tasks_completed.rationale: arch-6: no runtime gate existed to detect gitignored declared deliverables at Agent-dispatch time. Hook extracts all dev-report paths from Agent prompt via DEV_REPORT_PATTERN.finditer() (not search), checks git check-ignore --no-index --quiet per-path, blocks with exit 2 if any path is ignored without valid gitignore_waiver.

tasks_completed.description: Registered pretool-gitignore-preflight.py in settings.json under existing Agent matcher entry
tasks_completed.changes: Added {"type":"command","command":"python3 \"$HOME/.claude/hooks/pretool-gitignore-preflight.py\""} to existing matcher:Agent hooks[] array (not a new entry)
tasks_completed.rationale: Required by AC6 and spec R1; appended to existing Agent entry to avoid duplicate matcher entries

tasks_completed.changes: Line ~115 mtime-refresh: added '|| { printf skip; exit 0; }' guard. Line ~118 increment: replaced bare echo with 'if ! printf ... 2>/dev/null > COUNTER_FILE; then printf skip; exit 0; fi'. Line ~129 group redirection: added '2>/dev/null' to suppress EISDIR on lock-file creation.
tasks_completed.rationale: arch-3 (spec R5a): bare echo/printf redirects had no failure branch; under ENOSPC/EISDIR the decision subshell fell through to printf emit, causing rate-limit bypass on every subsequent prompt. The if ! form and the || guard correctly short-circuit to skip. Lock-file EISDIR suppression added after Codex finding 3.

tasks_completed.description: Wrote pytest test suite covering all 14 ACs
tasks_completed.rationale: TDD coverage for AC1a, AC1b, AC2, AC3, AC4a, AC4b, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC7b, AC8, AC9, AC10, AC11. All 14 tests pass.

scripts_created.purpose: PreToolUse hook (matcher Agent): blocks Agent dispatches when declared dev-report deliverables are matched by .gitignore
parameters: stdin JSON with tool_name=Agent and tool_input.prompt
scripts_created.usage: Registered in settings.json; invoked automatically by Claude harness on Agent tool use

exit_codes.0: No-op (no dev-report path in prompt, report absent, all paths pass, or valid gitignore_waiver)
exit_codes.2: BLOCKED: one or more declared paths are gitignored without a valid gitignore_waiver

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: arch-6: no runtime gate existed to enforce shippability of declared deliverables at Agent-dispatch time. arch-3: L1.5 counter-write had no error branch; ENOSPC caused silent fall-through to printf emit.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: arch-6: new PreToolUse hook intercepts Agent dispatches and checks declared paths via git check-ignore. arch-3: write failures now produce a skip-and-exit path that is non-blocking and silent.

dev.qa_notes: Run pytest tests/generated/20260524-171714/test_arch6_arch3.py (all 14 pass). Verify AC6 manually: check settings.json Agent entry and hook executable bit. Verify AC7/AC7b EISDIR harness per harness_recipe in acceptance-criteria JSON. Verify bash -n on userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh exits 0.

imported_by: Claude Code harness (reads on every tool invocation)

recommendations: Consider adding an AC7c test where .lock file itself is a directory (Codex finding 3 is now fixed by 2>/dev/null on group redirect; verify QA covers this edge case)
The 'declared paths only' limitation (Codex finding 5/arch-6 known gap) should be noted in /close: arch-6 cannot catch ignored deliverables omitted from dev.files_created entirely

self_verification.notes: All 14 pytest ACs pass. bash -n on userprompt-tmpfs-pressure.sh exits 0. Hook executable bit set (0o755). settings.json parses as valid JSON with new entry in Agent matcher. Codex finding 1 (findall vs search) applied. Codex finding 2 (isinstance list check) applied. Codex finding 3 (lock-file 2>/dev/null) applied. Codex finding 4 (rc=128 as not-ignored) intentionally retained per BA spec technical hints.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex session 019e5b85 returned 4 findings: 1 BLOCKER (findall vs search for multi-report prompts), 2 MAJOR (schema validation for non-list fields; lock-file EISDIR stderr leak), 1 MINOR (rc=128 treatment), 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY (known declared-paths gap). All 3 in_scope_real_bug findings applied. MINOR finding 4 rejected as intentional per BA spec.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Finding 1 (BLOCKER): changed DEV_REPORT_PATTERN.search() to .finditer() and check all matched reports. Finding 2 (MAJOR): added isinstance(files_modified, list) / isinstance(files_created, list) guard + isinstance(path, str) check in inner loop. Finding 3 (MAJOR): added 2>/dev/null to group redirect '} 9> LOCK_FILE' to suppress EISDIR stderr. Finding 4 (MINOR): rc=128 treated as not-ignored intentionally (BA spec: exit 128 = error, treat as not-ignored). Finding 5: OBSERVATION_ONLY logged.
